subcodes.first_line: In this day must the loved ones of God fix their gaze upon the Most Exalted Horizon and remain unperturbed by the diverse conditions of this world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز باید دوستان الهی بافق اعلی ناظر باشند و از شئونات مختلفه دنیا محزون نباشند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
